name: SMILE Gap Analyzer (The Critic Agent)
description: An architectural auditing agent acting as a Senior Systems Reviewer. It ingests a user's digital twin concept, sanitizes inputs, queries 4 LPI tools, and audits the concept against the SMILE framework to generate a 'Missing Reality Report' that highlights overlooked parameters and system blind spots.

capabilities.accepts: Natural language description of a proposed digital twin architecture
capabilities.produces: A 'Missing Reality Report' detailing architectural flaws, forgotten variables, and framework deviations
capabilities.explains: Forces the LLM to strictly cite the LPI context used for every single architectural critique using [Tool: name] syntax.

skills.name: System Architecture Auditing
skills.description: Cross-references proposed user concepts against established LPI case studies to find missing system components.

skills.name: Prompt Injection Mitigation
skills.description: Applies Regex-based sanitization to incoming user concepts before they interact with the LLM or MCP server.

skills.name: Stateless Subprocess Bridge
skills.description: Manages MCP tool execution using stateless subprocess.communicate() to prevent BrokenPipeErrors during stream handling.

explainability.description: The system prompt explicitly restricts the LLM from hallucinating critiques. Every identified gap in the user's logic must be appended with a direct inline citation to the LPI tool that provided the framework rule.
